overview.description: Data science and ML consulting firm helping Czech businesses turn data into profit
overview.description_long: Data Mind (Data Mind s.r.o.) is a Prague-based data science boutique founded in 2009. They build custom machine learning models, customer segmentations, predictive analytics, and data engineering pipelines for mid-to-large Czech companies. Services span Azure/Microsoft Fabric integration, BI reporting, churn analysis, next-best-offer models, dynamic pricing, and AI/ML automation. Over 100 data projects delivered, with 2/3 running in production.
overview.tagline: Učíme data vydělávat! (We teach data to earn money!)

history.origin_story: Founded by Jan Matoušek, a data scientist with experience at RCA-Research, The Gallup Organization, OgilvyOne, and O2. One of the first specialised data science firms on the Czech market.

key_milestones.event: Founded in Prague as one of the first Czech data science consultancies
100+ data projects delivered, 2/3 running in production

metadata.notes: Small Czech data science consultancy founded 2009. No CNAIP entry found. 11 team members visible on website team page. Bootstrapped / no VC funding visible. IČO: 28953789. Address: Ke Stírce 1766/5, 182 00 Praha 8.

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Domain-specific focus (data_engineering) with proprietary tech or established customer base provides moat against foundation model commoditization.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: Established customer base with proven market demand.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: No public funding information. Sustainability unclear.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Strong position across assessed risk dimensions with clear moats or stability factors.
